form.formComment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 11 at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 1700m, on a wet track; 4.5 len behind Rose Prairie with 58kg. Before that 10th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on January 31 over 1600m, 7 len behind Canena with 56kg at $10. Ready to open his account this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Returns from a 39-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 11 at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 1700m, on a wet track; 4.5 len behind Rose Prairie with 58kg. Before that 10th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on January 31 over 1600m, 7 len behind Canena with 56kg at $10. Ready to open his account this time.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 10 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Ivra Chope with 53kg at $3.30. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 2100m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Damabiah Angel with 52kg at $13. Hard to fault if at her best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Last start 5th of 10 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Ivra Chope with 53kg at $3.30. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 2100m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Damabiah Angel with 52kg at $13. Hard to fault if at her best.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 11 at Fontainebleau on March 31 over 2000m, slow going 4 len behind Victoria Secret carrying 53kg at $20. Before that 5th of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Seu Jo carrying 57.5kg at $13. Hard to have.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Most recently 6th of 11 at Fontainebleau on March 31 over 2000m, slow going 4 len behind Victoria Secret carrying 53kg at $20. Before that 5th of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Seu Jo carrying 57.5kg at $13. Hard to have.

form.formComment: At the latest run 11th of 13 at Pornichet on March 25 over 2400m, 8 len behind Mooney Vision with 56.5kg at $75. Before that 7th of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, slow going 16 len behind Crystal Bay carrying 55kg. Rates highly and can make amends.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). At the latest run 11th of 13 at Pornichet on March 25 over 2400m, 8 len behind Mooney Vision with 56.5kg at $75. Before that 7th of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, slow going 16 len behind Crystal Bay carrying 55kg. Rates highly and can make amends.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Deauville All Weather November 2 over 1300m, 7 len behind Miss Chiquita with 58kg at $50. On debut ninth of 13 at Chantilly October 2 over 1400m, 8 len behind Real News with 54.5kg at $72. Prefer to see how she has returned.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Deauville All Weather November 2 over 1300m, 7 len behind Miss Chiquita with 58kg at $50. On debut ninth of 13 at Chantilly October 2 over 1400m, 8 len behind Real News with 54.5kg at $72. Prefer to see how she has returned.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 16 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1800m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Victoria Secret carrying 55kg at $17. The start before that raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Pornichet on January 24 over 2100m, 16 len behind Australasia carrying 58kg at $11. Likely to find this out of reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Most recently 5th of 16 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1800m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Victoria Secret carrying 55kg at $17. The start before that raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Pornichet on January 24 over 2100m, 16 len behind Australasia carrying 58kg at $11. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Deauville All Weather January 29 over 1900m, 17 len behind Anolante carrying 51kg at $12. On debut second last of 9 at Angers November 16 over 2000m, 9 len behind Rue Recamier carrying 56kg at $16. Shapes up nicely.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Deauville All Weather January 29 over 1900m, 17 len behind Anolante carrying 51kg at $12. On debut second last of 9 at Angers November 16 over 2000m, 9 len behind Rue Recamier carrying 56kg at $16. Shapes up nicely.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Johnny Drive carrying 54.5kg at $3. The race before that 5th of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, slow going 13 len behind Crystal Bay carrying 56.5kg. Heading in the right direction and looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Johnny Drive carrying 54.5kg at $3. The race before that 5th of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, slow going 13 len behind Crystal Bay carrying 56.5kg. Heading in the right direction and looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 9th of 11 at Auteuil on March 14 over 3000m, on heavy track; 72 len behind In Between Days with 67kg at $74. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Sabl?-sur-Sarthe on August 31 over 1650m, slow going 1.5 len behind Dollar Des Bois carrying 56.5kg. Can do much better this time with the run under her belt.
